certifications.name: Global Organic Textile Standard
certifications.description: The leading worldwide standard for organic fibers, including ecological and social criteria, backed up by independent certification of the entire textile supply chain.

certifications.name: Global Recycled Standard
certifications.description: An international, voluntary, full product standard that sets requirements for third-party certification of recycled content, chain of custody, social and environmental practices, and chemical restrictions.

certifications.name: Business Social Compliance Initiative
certifications.description: A leading supply chain management system that supports companies to drive social compliance and improvements within the factories and farms in their global supply chains.

certifications.name: OEKO-TEX Standard 100
certifications.description: A globally uniform, independent testing and certification system for raw, semi-finished, and finished textile products at all processing levels, as well as accessory materials.

certifications.name: Fair Wear Foundation
certifications.description: An independent, non-profit organization that works with garment brands, workers, and industry influencers to improve working conditions in factories.

consultation_types.name: 30-minute sourcing consultation
consultation_types.description: A focused 30-minute virtual call to discuss sourcing needs, preferred materials, and suitable factories or suppliers.

consultation_types.name: 60-minute sourcing consultation
consultation_types.description: An in-depth 60-minute session to map out sourcing strategy, compare supplier options, and plan timelines.

consultation_types.name: 30-minute production planning session
consultation_types.description: A 30-minute call dedicated to production planning, including MOQs, lead times, and quality level decisions.

product_categories.name: Apparel

resources.title: Understanding BSCI Audits for Apparel Factories
resources.summary: Learn how BSCI audits work, what auditors look for in apparel factories, and how brands can interpret audit results.
resources.content: This article explains the Business Social Compliance Initiative (BSCI) framework, common non-compliances in garment factories, and how to prepare suppliers for successful audits...

resources.title: BSCI Compliance Checklist for New Suppliers
resources.summary: A practical checklist brands can share with factories to prepare for BSCI audits.
resources.content: Use this checklist to review policies, documentation, and on-site conditions before scheduling a BSCI audit...

resources.title: GOTS Certification Guide for Organic Cotton T-Shirts
resources.summary: Step-by-step guidance for brands that want to launch GOTS-certified organic cotton t-shirt programs.
resources.content: This guide covers key GOTS requirements, labeling rules, and how to work with certified factories and mills for your t-shirt collections...

resources.title: GOTS vs OEKO-TEX: Which Certification Do You Need?
resources.summary: Compare the scope, requirements, and use cases of GOTS and OEKO-TEX Standard 100.
resources.content: Both GOTS and OEKO-TEX are widely recognized textile standards, but they cover different parts of the supply chain...

resources.title: Sourcing GRS-Certified Recycled Polyester Fabrics
resources.summary: How to source GRS-certified recycled polyester fabrics under tight cost and MOQ constraints.
resources.content: Recycled polyester can help reduce environmental impact, but brands must carefully review certifications, prices, and minimums...

resources.title: How to Estimate Landed Cost for Hoodie Production
resources.summary: A walkthrough of duty, freight, and overhead components when calculating hoodie landed costs.
resources.content: Landed cost goes far beyond FOB pricing. This article breaks down the components using a 500-unit hoodie example...

resources.title: Choosing Sustainable Shipping Methods for Apparel
resources.summary: Compare sea, air, rail, and express shipping options from a cost and carbon perspective.
resources.content: Transportation is a major contributor to your product’s carbon footprint. This report compares transit times, costs, and emissions...

resources.title: Print-on-Demand for Organic Cotton Streetwear
resources.summary: Best practices for working with DTG print-on-demand partners on organic cotton tees and hoodies.
resources.content: For small MOQs and rapid testing, print-on-demand can be an ideal solution. This guide explains how to choose partners, set artwork specs, and manage quality...

resources.title: New Fashion Brand Launch Playbook
resources.summary: From idea to first production run: a structured playbook for new apparel brands.
resources.content: Launching a new brand involves aligning product, supply chain, and marketing timelines. This playbook outlines key milestones and common pitfalls...

resources.title: Case Study: Scaling a Sustainable Streetwear Line to 10,000 Units
resources.summary: How one brand scaled organic cotton hoodies and tees from 500 to 10,000 units while maintaining sustainability standards.
resources.content: This case study follows a streetwear brand that prioritized GOTS fabrics and BSCI-audited factories as it scaled production...

shipping_methods.name: Sea Freight (4–6 weeks)
shipping_methods.description: Cost-effective ocean freight option suitable for bulk apparel shipments with flexible timelines.

shipping_methods.name: Air Freight (7–10 days)
shipping_methods.description: Standard air freight balancing speed and cost, ideal for urgent replenishment orders.

shipping_methods.name: Express Courier (3–5 days)
shipping_methods.description: Fast door-to-door delivery via express courier services for samples and small shipments.

shipping_methods.name: Rail Freight (12–18 days)
shipping_methods.description: Rail freight option between key Asian and European hubs, offering a balance of speed and emissions.

shipping_methods.name: Truck Delivery (3–7 days)
shipping_methods.description: Regional road transport for intra-continental deliveries from port or factory to warehouse.

factory_product_capabilities.notes: Core focus on GOTS-certified organic cotton crewneck tees in 160–200gsm. Supports solid colors like black, white, and heather greys with reactive dyeing.
Vertically integrated GOTS t-shirt lines from knitting to packing. Strong on fashion fits and pigment-dyed colors.
Premium organic streetwear tees with options for heavy 240gsm fabrics and garment dye finishes. EU-nearshore production.
Organic cotton brushed fleece hoodies up to 320gsm. Ideal for basics programs rather than fashion washes.
Specializes in GOTS fleece hoodies with flatlock details and custom trims. Supports both pullover and zip styles.
Crewneck sweatshirts in 280–320gsm brushed fleece with rib trims and garment wash options.
Ethically produced premium hoodies with EU fabrics and low MOQs, ideal for sustainable streetwear capsules.
Knit joggers and sweatpants with elastic cuffs and printed branding, suitable for mass-market streetwear.
Reactive-dyed cotton and poly-cotton tees optimized for screen printing and large graphics.
Athleisure joggers with tapered fit, adjustable waistbands, and brushed back fleece options.
Heavyweight 400gsm hoodies with custom patterns, embroidery, and garment dye treatments aimed at premium streetwear.
Premium double-knit joggers with concealed zips and custom hardware.
Fast-turnaround denim lines with 10–12oz rigid and stretch fabrics, multiple dry and wet process options. Strong fit for fast-fashion jeans programs.
Mid-market denim production with a strong wash library and sustainable laser/ozone finishing capabilities.
Heritage denim programs with premium construction and small-batch selvedge options. Longer lead times due to specialty finishing.
Performance leggings with recycled polyester options, compression fits, and flatlock seams. Suitable for activewear brands focused on sustainability.
Broader activewear sets including leggings, sports bras, and tops made with moisture-wicking and recycled fabrics.
High-volume basic tees in cotton and poly-cotton blends; optimized for price-sensitive programs and promotions.
Cost-effective fleece hoodies for mass programs in standard fits and core colors.
